query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION) as cols, COUNT(*) as total FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'book_profiles'
